about.title: About Nodus
about.story_p1: Nodus — meaning 'knot' or 'connection point' — was born from a simple belief: the best moments in life happen over a great cup of coffee.
about.story_p2: Founded in 2024, we set out to create a space where craftsmanship meets community. Every bean is ethically sourced, every drink is handcrafted, and every visit is an experience.
about.story_p3: From our signature espresso blends to our seasonal specialties, we pour passion into every cup. But Nodus is more than coffee — it's a place to connect, create, and find your calm.
about.value_quality_desc: We source the finest beans from ethical farms and roast them to perfection.
about.value_community_desc: More than a cafe — a gathering place for ideas, conversations, and friendships.
about.value_sustainability_desc: Eco-friendly packaging, zero-waste practices, and locally sourced ingredients.
about.value_craft_desc: Every drink is an art form, prepared by skilled baristas with care and precision.
